product_results.title: LUCKY STEP Women's Retro Fashion Sneakers Classic Casual Walking Shoes Non Slip Comfort Skate Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these sneakers very comfortable and stylish. They describe the shoes as good quality and great overall. The appearance receives positive feedback, with customers noting they are jolies and have jolie couleur, including nice gold options. However, customers have mixed experiences with the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Cute shoes!! Must haves!!
authors_reviews.text: Love Lucky Step!! My new favorite shoe!! I have 3 pairs now!!! So comfy and fit true to size!
authors_reviews.author: Brandi

authors_reviews.title: Love them!
authors_reviews.text: Absolutely adorable and so versatile!! They go with so many outfits (jeans, dress pants, yoga pants)! Very comfortable and look just like the picture! Highly recommend
authors_reviews.author: Madamt

authors_reviews.title: Good option to the expense brands
authors_reviews.text: Very comfortable but lack arch support. Good option to the expensive brands, but if you have high arches, and want to use them for longer walks may need something different. But super comfortable for casual ware and look great.
authors_reviews.author: HeatherD

authors_reviews.title: So comfortable
authors_reviews.text: These shoes turned out to be really comfortable. I was kinda scared when I put them on because I bought them for my vacation, and they came the night before. When I initially put them on, I thought oh no they won't do for walking around etc. So I wore them on the plane just to see how they would feel. Wow! They ended up being so comfortable that I wore them 3 out of the 5 days that I was away. Love them!They are true to size
authors_reviews.author: A. Ferguson

authors_reviews.title: Cute but uncomfortable
authors_reviews.text: Cute but material on top is stiff and uncomfortable. Will be returning
authors_reviews.author: Robert Burns

authors_reviews.title: Love them!!
authors_reviews.text: These are awesome sneakers.I’m a true 8.5 with a wider foot so I sized up to the 9 and they fit perfect perfectly. I went with the red, the red is quite vibrant and they’re really good quality.
authors_reviews.author: Lisa Guillet

authors_reviews.title: 5 star
authors_reviews.text: Super cute and super cushy. Love them
authors_reviews.author: SJM

authors_reviews.title: Love the colour combo!
authors_reviews.text: Cute, inexpensive casual shoes. The look isn’t cheap. Not for long walks as they don’t have the support needed, but perfect for the office!
authors_reviews.author: CAT
